full_description: TravelPal is a travel companion app that helps users plan, organize, and navigate their trips. It features a map view, itinerary builder, and packing list generator. With TravelPal, you can easily create and manage your trip itinerary, add destinations, and set reminders. The map view allows you to visualize your route and explore nearby attractions. The packing list generator helps you remember essential items to pack. Whether you're a frequent traveler or planning a dream vacation, TravelPal is the perfect companion to make your journey smoother and more enjoyable.
